title: Apple Introduces iPhone 17e
text: Apple introduced the iPhone 17e as a more affordable member of the iPhone 17 family. The device includes the A19 chip, Apple's C1X cellular modem, a 48MP Fusion camera, improved durability, MagSafe support, and 256GB of starting storage. The launch matters for Apple's investment story because the iPhone remains a major revenue driver and an important entry point into the Apple ecosystem. A lower-priced model can help Apple reach customers who want newer performance and features without buying the most expensive iPhone models. By combining hardware upgrades with access to services such as iCloud, Apple Music, Apple TV, Apple Pay, and the App Store, the iPhone 17e can support both device sales and future recurring services revenue.
